title: Lil-Lets Cotton Wool Round Pads, 200 Count, Certified Organic, 100% Pure Cotton Wool, Soft and Absorbent, Gentle on Skin, Dermatologically Tested, Bulk Pack
features: CERTIFIED ORGANIC COTTON - Made from 100% pure organic cotton, certified to GOTS (Global Organic Textile Standard) by the Soil Association. No synthetic pesticides, herbicides, genetically modified organisms (GMOs) or other harsh chemicals are used in the production of Lil-Lets Cotton Wool
GENTLE ON YOUR SKIN - Lil-Lets natural cotton wool pads are dermatologically tested, and designed with a dual sided finish, to be versatile and gentle on all skin types including sensitive skin

BEAUTY & PERSONAL CARE - Soft, strong and absorbent, each pad is side stitched to help maintain shape and prevent pad splitting, whilst interlacing of the cotton fibres ensures minimal fibre shedding, making these pads ideal for all your cosmetic and personal care needs
ETHICALLY SOURCED - Lil-Lets are committed to ensuring the safe and fair treatment of the people involved in making our cotton products. All our products are also vegan friendly and cruelty free

CHOOSE WHAT WORKS FOR YOU - At Lil-Lets, we understand that everybody is unique. That’s why we design personal care products that cater to your individual needs. With 70 years of experience, you can trust Lil-Lets for a gentle sustainable solution that cares for you and the planet
description: Product Description Lil-Lets cotton wool pads are super soft, absorbent and crafted from 100% pure organic cotton. Dermatologically tested and gentle on your skin, they ensure our best care for your personal and beauty routines. Lil-Let's cotton range is made with certified organic cotton by GOTS and the Soil Association. The Global Organic Textile standard is globally recognised and ensures that all the cotton used in this product meets strict organic standards. Our cotton is grown without the use of synthetic pesticides, herbicides, or genetically modified organisms (GMOs) and prohibits the use of potentially harmful chemicals during the manufacturing process, reflecting a commitment to organic farming practices. We can ensure fair and safe working conditions as well as compliance with environmental criteria that ensures transparency and traceability throughout the full supply chain, giving consumers confidence that by choosing Lil-Lets Cotton, you are being kind to the planet and to people. To prevent loose fibres and separation, all our round pads are side stitched to maintain shape and durability for all your beauty and cosmetic needs. Our round cotton pads are packaged conveniently in a drawstring bag, made from 30% recycled plastic, keeping them hygienic and dry, ready for use. Our Lil-Lets Cotton range also includes: cotton buds, cotton balls, cotton ovals, cotton rolls, cotton pleats and a range of cotton for babies. Choose Lil-Lets cotton for a gentle, sustainable solution that cares for you and the planet. For more information about our products please visit our website Ingredients Cotton Directions 1. Wet the pad with warm water or a makeup remover. 2. Gently wipe the area in a circular motion. 3. Rinse and repeat if necessary. 4. Dispose of the pad responsibly after use. Safety Warning May cause skin irritation. Dispose of responsibly to protect the environment. See more
